spec_match.rationale: Uses navigator.cpuPerformance as the coarse numeric CPU tier and falls back cleanly when the attribute is absent.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked all tier buttons; modelled codec budgets and verdicts updated for every tier.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still demonstrates tier-gated codec selection for a 30-image feed.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now wraps performance.now() around img.decode() for local WebP/JPEG samples and compares measured per-image cost against the 500 ms feed budget.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: The decode probe resolves canvas colors from design-system CSS variables instead of raw hex literals.

summary: Codec selection now combines the tier model with live img.decode() timing for local sample codecs. Chrome DevTools MCP verified tier changes, measured readouts, verdict updates, and no console errors.
